name: Key Lime Cheesecake with Raspberry Sauce
recipeIngredient: 10 Oz Pkg Frozen Raspberries In Syrup, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cookie crumbs with butter and press into bottom of 9 inch springform pan; refrigerate.
2. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese until smooth. Gradually beat in sugar. Beat in eggs, one at a time, blending until smooth. Add remaining filling ingredients, beating until smooth. Pour over prepared crust.
3. Bake at 325 F for 55 to 65 minutes or until set.
4. To minimize cracking, place a shallow pan half full of hot water on the lower rack during baking.
5. Turn oven off. Let cheesecake stand in oven 30 minutes with door open at least 4 inches.
6. Remove from oven and let stand 10 minutes. Remove sides of pan and cool to room temperature on a wire rack. Refrigerate overnight or up to three days.
7. For sauce, drain raspberries, reserving syrup. Add water to syrup to make 3/4 cup. In a small saucepan, combine syrup mixture and cornstarch; mix well. Add jelly; cook and stir over medium heat until thickened and clear. Stir in raspberries. Refrigerate until cold.
8. Serve cheesecake slices with sauce.
